product.name: Magic Spoon Brain Boost Nootropic Bites
product.category: Health Foods > Functional Snacks > Nootropic Snacks
product.description: Pop-able cereal bites infused with nootropics for clean focus and clarity. Bite-sized cereal snacks crafted with adaptogens, B-vitamins, and protein to support mental clarity and focus. Designed for study sessions, creative work, or gaming, these crunchy bites offer great taste along with a functional boost -- without excessive sugar or stimulants.
